series_metadata.series_description: The Commodity Assistance Program, includes the Temporary Emergency Food Assistance program (TEFAP), Ohio Food Program (OFP), and Commodity supplemental Food Program (CFSP). The program provides food and services to food banks and food pantries. File contains Ohio Food program (OFP and Commodity Supplemental Food Program (CFSP) federal reports on food banks, shipping reports and USDA food inventories for tracking distribution, and related correspondence.
